title: High Summoner

recommends.reason: Cleanly wraps the PF2e character sheet so avatars suppress the attribute-boost EDIT glow with no render flicker. Falls back to a render hook if absent.
Adds an Egi Companion daily so avatars can prepare familiar abilities.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.description: A creature with this trait is the High Summoner's avatar. An item with this trait can be worn by an avatar. An avatar can have up to two items invested.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.description: A creature with this trait is the High Summoner's avatar. An item with this trait can be worn by an avatar. An avatar can have up to two items invested.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.description: Feats with this and the Evolution trait affect your avatar instead of you, typically by granting it additional physical capabilities.

luster.label: Luster
luster.description: This weapon can channel light energy. You gain the Shine free action while wielding a resonant weapon.

description: A Pathfinder 2e class archetype for the Summoner — the High Summoner. Adds the archetype and its avatar (an eidolon-style companion) with the custom avatar trait, themed spells, the Luster weapon trait, and optional PF2e Dailies integration. Unofficial fan content for Foundry VTT v13.
